title: Bridge Essay: Visual perspective and body ownership modulate vicarious pain and touch: A syste

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, body ownership as constructed percept.

**Visual perspective and body ownership modulate vicarious pain and touch: Asystematic review.**. Psychon Bull Rev.. PMID: 38429591. DOI: 10.3758/s13423-024-02477-5. We conducted asystematic review investigating the influence of visual perspective and body ownership (BO) on vicarious brain resonance and vicarious sensations during the observation of pain and touch. Indeed, the way in which brain reactivity and the phenomenological experience can be modulated by blurring the bodily boundaries of self-other distinction is still unclear.
